description_long: This stone temple features a massive stepped pyramid base constructed from gray stone blocks, reminiscent of Mesoamerican architecture. Atop the pyramid sits a rectangular sanctuary with a turquoise roof and brightly colored friezes, including geometric and wave-like patterns in red, gold, and blue. The front of the temple is marked by a prominent staircase leading up to a portico with red trim and black-and-white columns, providing access to the upper sanctuary. The sides and rear of the pyramid are unadorned, emphasizing the imposing, geometric form of the structure. The overall design is monumental, with strong horizontal and vertical lines, and the decorative banding adds visual interest to the uppermost section. The temple's surfaces appear rough and weathered, suggesting durability and age.
description: A large, stepped stone pyramid temple with a colorful, decorated sanctuary on top and a prominent front staircase and portico. The structure features geometric patterns and a turquoise roof, evoking ancient Mesoamerican styles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sloped stone pyramid base and the upper sanctuary with turquoise roof and decorative friezes; the staircase and portico are visible on the right.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the main staircase, red-trimmed portico, and the entrance to the sanctuary above; geometric patterns and columns are clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the pyramid base and upper sanctuary visible; the staircase and portico are now on the left, showing the temple's symmetry.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain stone pyramid base and the sanctuary above, with no visible entrance or portico; decorative friezes are still visible on the sanctuary.
attribute_ornamentation: dense geometric patterns and colored friezes, especially on the upper sanctuary; minimal ornamentation on the pyramid base
attribute_entrance_design: Rectangular portico with red trim, black-and-white columns, and a wide staircase leading up to the main entrance; entrance is framed by geometric patterns and colored bands.
